instructions: Authoritative build checklist. Work top-to-bottom; mark each task in_progress then completed and KEEP THIS FILE UPDATED. Do not hand-write the Next.js skeleton — always scaffold with the boilerplate command in T001. If the site needs more than these (e.g. a blog CMS, extra landing pages), append new tasks and, if substantial, new mission files.

tasks.title: Scaffold the project with the official Next.js boilerplate: `npx create-next-app@latest . --yes --ts --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --use-npm --turbopack`
Initialize shadcn/ui (`npx shadcn@latest init`) and configure Tailwind theme

Apply the starter design system from `../design-kit/` — copy `globals.css` + `tailwind.theme.ts`, keep the detected tone (corners/shadow/palette in `design-kit/tone.json`), pull matching components from the sources in `design-kit/README.md` (shadcn/ui, 21st.dev)
Refine the design SYSTEM using `design-token-plan.md` as INSPIRATION — modernize (don't clone the dated source); lock in palette, typography, spacing, radius, motion
Implement root layout (header/footer) from global/navigation.json + footer.json
Apply the COMPLEMENTARY palette from `../design-kit/tokens.json` (a fresh, harmonious-but-distinct scheme — do not reuse the source colors)
Generate brand-new assets (logo/wordmark, hero imagery, icons, typography) per `../design-kit/asset-generation-brief.md`; do NOT ship captured assets
Ensure fully mobile-responsive layouts at every breakpoint (mobile-first)
Provision PostgreSQL + Drizzle; define schema per `database-plan.md`
Implement API route handlers per `api-contracts.md` (Zod-validated)
Wire authentication (Auth.js v5) and protect app routes
Wire integrations with client credentials: Auth.js (NextAuth v5), Resend, Calendly or Cal.com, Cloudflare Turnstile (see `integrations-plan.md`)
Build route `/home-1` (unknown)
Build route `/services` (services_index)
tasks.notes: src/app/services/page.tsx — 3 service tiles (code-based SVGs), trust band, CTA. Consumes SERVICES from site-config. + /services/[slug] detail pages with generateStaticParams, generateMetadata, Breadcrumb+LocalBusiness JSON-LD, FAQ section (FAQPage JSON-LD), CTA band. Long-form content in src/content/services/detail.ts.

tasks.title: Build route `/clients` (unknown)
tasks.notes: src/app/clients/page.tsx — testimonials grid (TESTIMONIALS from site-config), project gallery (3 code-based SVGs), CTA band, LocalBusiness+WebSite JSON-LD.

tasks.title: Build route `/client-callback` (unknown)
Build route `/services-5` (unknown)
Build route `/` (homepage)
Build route `/book-online` (unknown)
tasks.notes: src/app/book-online/page.tsx — modern rebuild replaces password gate with real booking: embeds NEXT_PUBLIC_BOOKING_URL scheduler if set, else fallback CTA to /contact + call. Contact alternatives band. LocalBusiness+WebSite JSON-LD.

tasks.title: Build route `/story` (unknown)
tasks.notes: src/app/story/page.tsx — founder story (Devin Aloise), values (VALUES from site-config), founder portrait SVG, CTA band, LocalBusiness+WebSite JSON-LD.

tasks.title: Build email + lead capture via resend, persisting leads to the DB — see Mission 'lead-capture-email'
Build the blog with 5 generated starter articles + images + thumbnails + SEO/GEO — see Mission 'blog-content'
tasks.notes: 5 TSX articles + code-based SVG thumbnails in src/content/blog + public/blog; /blog index, /blog/[slug] (generateStaticParams + generateMetadata + Article/FAQ/Breadcrumb JSON-LD), /blog/tag/[tag], /blog/rss.xml RSS feed. Type-clean. CTA clicks instrumented via TrackClick -> /api/track.

tasks.title: Add micro-interactions & micro-animations (Framer Motion); polish responsive states
Instrument site-wide analytics + logging (pageviews, traffic, users, logins, signups, purchases) per `analytics-plan.md`; no page ships untracked
Apply per-page metadata from `06-metadata-map.json`; generate sitemap.xml + robots.txt
tasks.notes: DONE: src/app/sitemap.ts (all routes incl. blog articles + tags + images), src/app/robots.ts (allow all, disallow /admin + /api, sitemap ref), metadata for /blog, /blog/[slug], /blog/tag/[tag], /privacy, /terms. PENDING: apply metadata to marketing pages (/ , /services, /story, /clients, /book-online, /contact) from 06-metadata-map.json.

tasks.title: Add JSON-LD structured data + llms.txt for GEO; verify Rich Results
tasks.notes: DONE: src/components/seo/json-ld.tsx (LocalBusiness/GeneralContractor, WebSite, Article, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage), public/llms.txt, Article+FAQ+Breadcrumb rendered on blog, LocalBusiness+WebSite on blog index + legal pages. PENDING: integrator to add <LocalBusinessJsonLd/> + <WebSiteJsonLd/> to src/app/layout.tsx root layout (lead owns that file). Fill NAP (phone/address) via NEXT_PUBLIC_BUSINESS_* env when owner provides.

tasks.title: Run QA checklist (`smart-site-qa-checklist.md`); Lighthouse > 95; WCAG AA
Deploy per `deployment-plan.md`; verify env vars + integrations live
